citation: ILO C181 Art. 7; PH RA 11765 (Financial Products and Services Consumer Protection Act)
indicator: Recruitment-fee camouflage label that emerged in 2026 in remote-work / content-moderation OFW deployments. Replaces the older 'training fee' label in newer schemes. Always presumptively illegal under ILO C181 Art. 7.

citation: FATF Recommendation 32 (cross-border value transfer); FATF Recommendation 15 (virtual assets)
indicator: Payments to crypto wallets for OFW deployment fees indicate FATF Rec. 32 + Rec. 15 apply. Always fraudulent in this context.
